arguments.content:
# Sprint 9 Week 1 Review Presentation

**Date:** April 10, 2026  
**Sprint:** Sprint 9, Week 1  
**Presenter:** Alex Zhang, Backend Tech Lead  

---

## 📊 Sprint Overview

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Sprint Goal Achieved | ✅ Yes |
| Team Velocity | 42 points |
| Progress | 100% |
| Blocked Items | 0 |
| Completed Stories | 17 |

---

## 🏆 This Week's Achievements

### 1. Refactored Authentication Module Deployed
- Zero-downtime migration completed
- All integration tests passing
- Security review approved

### 2. Legacy Database Tables Migrated
- 3 legacy tables fully migrated
- Data integrity verified: 100% match
- Rollback tested and documented

### 3. Critical API Performance Fix
- p99 response time improved: 245ms → 210ms
- 14% performance gain week-over-week
- SLA targets exceeded

---

## 🎬 Demo Highlights (5 min each)

### Demo 1: New Dashboard Feature
- **Presenter:** Chen (Frontend)
- **Key Points:** Real-time project metrics, customizable layouts
- **Live Demo URL:** [staging.orion.tech/dashboard-v2](https://staging.orion.tech/dashboard-v2)

### Demo 2: Authentication Flow
- **Presenter:** Bai (Backend)
- **Key Points:** Single sign-on integration, session management
- **Test Account:** demo@orion.tech / Demo123!

### Demo 3: Performance Metrics
- **Presenter:** Alex
- **Key Points:** Before/after load test comparison
- **Graphs:** See `api_benchmark.json` for data

---

## ❓ Q&A Preparation

### Expected Questions & Responses

**Q: Is the new dashboard ready for beta customers?**  
A: Feature flag is enabled in staging. Target beta release: Week 2 pending UX feedback.

**Q: Any risks for Week 2 deployment?**  
A: None identified. Security scan pending (item 3 on checklist) — ETA Monday morning.

**Q: Why did velocity drop from 45 to 42?**  
A: Migration work was more complex than estimated. Still within acceptable range.

**Q: Are we on track for Sprint 9 goals?**  
A: Yes. Week 1 complete, no blockers, Week 2 planning ready.

---

## 📋 Action Items

| Task | Assignee | Due |
|------|----------|-----|
| Complete security scan | Dana | Apr 13 |
| Beta customer onboarding | PM | Apr 14 |
| Week 2 sprint planning | Alex | Apr 13 |

---

## 🙏 Thank You

Questions? Contact alex.zhang@orion.tech

Ready for Sprint Review presentation.
